betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Balefire§f

§aA devastating green fire — used for euphemium production and the ultimate RBMK fuels!§f

§bBalefire§f is a mysterious and extremely dangerous form of green fire with unique transmutation properties. When balefire is applied to schrabidium clusters, they transform into euphemium-etched schrabidium clusters — the essential step for §bEuphemium§f production.

§6Sources of Balefire§f:
§b• §bBalefire Block§f (hbm:balefire) — the fire itself, can be collected with balefire and steel
§b• §bBalefire Bomb§f (hbm:nuke_fstbmb) — the most common way to generate large amounts of balefire
§b• §bDuds§f — unexploded balefire bombs that can be detonated without fueling (rare but efficient)

§6Uses§f:
§b• §bEuphemium Production§f — place schrabidium clusters around balefire source, detonate → euphemium-etched clusters
§b• §bRBMK Fuel§f — balefire-based RBMK fuel rods are among the most powerful in the mod
§b• §bFlashgold Production§f — transmute gold into flashgold via balefire exposure

§6Custom Nuke Contribution§f:
Balefire contributes to the balefire stage in custom nuke construction.

§cWarning§f: Balefire spreads quickly and is extremely destructive. Never use balefire near your base without proper containment! The balefire bomb creates a massive crater and sets everything ablaze. The dud method for euphemium production requires careful placement — ensure clusters are positioned where balefire will reach them, and detonate at a safe distance from your base.

§eTip§f: Dud balefire bombs are the preferred method for initial euphemium production. They have a small footprint and don't require fueling. Later, automated euphemium via the Exposure Chamber and Dark Matter is safer and more reliable.
